case_title: ALEXIS MEYER VS. ALAN TONG D.D.S.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
